feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: A TIGRAYAN lady is running for Congress in the US. How common are northern Ethio…

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >GTA 6 >$100+++ dollarinos >Standard version is cucked and limited forcing you t…
entry.content: >GTA 6 >$100+++ dollarinos >Standard version is cucked and limited forcing you to get the more expensive edition >Downgraded looks like a generic PS4 game >Single player only >Online comes later as a separate game that you have to buy again >People praise, defend, and suck rockstar's dick, defending these abusive practices because it's justified "cus GTA"

entry.title: /int/ International: How does a city/town/village you were born with looks?
entry.content: Do you like it? Do you still live there or have you moved to another place? I was born in Bodaybo, which is a small gold mining town in the Northeast of Irkutsk Oblast, my family moved to Irkutsk in 2005. I visited it last summer till winter for work and liked it however small time I spent in the actual town.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Why the fuck does everyone act like Todd was some insane super scary psychopath …
entry.content: Why the fuck does everyone act like Todd was some insane super scary psychopath when he's clearly not? He grew up in a radically abnormal environment and developed a unique sense of morality because of it. There's nothing about him that makes him any scarier than the average Israeli or Palestinian.

entry.content: Before I got banned for the thousandth time, this time for no reason, on Dread someone informed me about a forum called "Heru777" i believe (plus another one but I forgot it and there's no way I can look back to find what it was. entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2918
entry.content: >Starstruck dition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83767873 >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.or

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I don’t understand it, so many prople are using AI to everything for them and lo…
entry.content: I don’t understand it, so many prople are using AI to everything for them and losinf interest in doing stuff for theirself, ive been told that me doing art and music is useless and that i shouldn’t bother cuz “ai can just do it so it doesn’t matter”. But i feel more fulfilled than ever when im making my own art, singing, playing musical instruments (been told theres no point playing instruments and singing cuz you can just turn on Spotify) What the fuck?

entry.content: You will never be a woman. Your chromosomes are you. Your body continues to make your own hormones, despite trying to block them. Tolerance builds. entry.title: /o/ Auto: R-A-P-E-D A-P-E
entry.content: Why wouldn’t this work? Trying to get AC in my car, it’s getting too hot here. It’s crude but would it work? I’m too stupid to figure out the factory AC system. Just going to cobble something together instead. The top one has the pressure switch hot. The bottom one has the pressure switch as a switched ground. Will post schematic image after the lust provoking image in this post.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Hollow Knight is such a pretty game. This is what passion feels like, these aust…
entry.content: Hollow Knight is such a pretty game. This is what passion feels like, these australians really poured their heart out while making this game. Could this feeling ever be replicated in a platformer? I know people would say Ori and the Blind Forest, but to me this game is special. The Knight is a special kind of character.
